message:
🌱 Add inspektor-gadget: Some integration tests report events for other namespace mission (#806)

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "inspektor-gadget-1001-some-integration-tests-report-events-for-other-namespace",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "inspektor-gadget: Some integration tests report events for other namespace",
+    "description": "Some integration tests report events for other namespace. Community-requested feature.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current inspektor-gadget deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your inspektor-gadget version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget\nhelm list -n inspektor-gadget 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working inspektor-gadget installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review inspektor-gadget configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant inspektor-gadget configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget\nkubectl get configmap -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=inspektor-gadget\n```\nSome integration tests report events for other namespace than the one dedicated to this test."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Some integration tests report events for other namespace",
+        "description": "The runcnotify package uses poll() to monitor the file descriptors (pidfd) of containers to detect when they are removed. A 1000ms timeout is used to make poll() return and update the list of file descriptors to monitor. This solution is not perfect since after a creation of a container, this\n```yaml\n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2901764Z     command.go:429: Stop command(StartCapabilitiesGadget)\n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2902359Z     command.go:431: Command returned(StartCapabilitiesGadget):\n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2902744Z         \n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2904562Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52\",\"namespace\":\"test-capabilities-2800655059608903620\",\"pod\":\"test-pod\",\"container\":\"test-pod\",\"type\":\"normal\",\"pid\":2444819,\"comm\":\"runc:[2:INIT]\",\"cap\":21,\"capName\":\"CAP_SYS_ADMIN\",\"verdict\":\"Allow\",\"mountnsid\":4026533142}\n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2906846Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n inspektor-gadget -l app.kubernetes.io/name=inspektor-gadget\nkubectl get events -n inspektor-gadget --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Some integration tests report events for other namespace\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "The runcnotify package uses poll() to monitor the file descriptors (pidfd) of containers to detect when they are removed. A 1000ms timeout is used to make poll() return and update the list of file descriptors to monitor.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "2022-09-30T12:03:54.2901764Z     command.go:429: Stop command(StartCapabilitiesGadget)\n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2902359Z     command.go:431: Command returned(StartCapabilitiesGadget):\n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2902744Z         \n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2904562Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52\",\"namespace\":\"test-capabilities-2800655059608903620\",\"pod\":\"test-pod\",\"container\":\"test-pod\",\"type\":\"normal\",\"pid\":2444819,\"comm\":\"runc:[2:INIT]\",\"cap\":21,\"capName\":\"CAP_SYS_ADMIN\",\"verdict\":\"Allow\",\"mountnsid\":4026533142}\n2022-09-30T12:03:54.2906846Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52\",\"namespace\":\"test-capabilities-2800655059608903620\",\"pod\":\"test-pod\",\"container\":\"test-pod\",\"type\":\"normal\",\"pid\":2444819,\"comm\":\"runc:[2:INIT]\",\"cap\":21,\"capName\":\"CAP_SYS_ADMI",
+        "2022-09-30T12:04:23.9869013Z     command.go:429: Stop command(StartBindsnoopGadget)\n2022-09-30T12:04:23.9869342Z     command.go:431: Command returned(StartBindsnoopGadget):\n2022-09-30T12:04:23.9869464Z         \n2022-09-30T12:04:23.9871243Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52\",\"namespace\":\"test-tcptop-2975123826752321008\",\"pod\":\"test-pod\",\"container\":\"test-pod\",\"type\":\"normal\",\"pid\":2473226,\"comm\":\"nc\",\"proto\":\"TCP\",\"addr\":\"::\",\"port\":9090,\"opts\":\".R...\",\"mountnsid\":4026533142}\n2022-09-30T12:04:23.9872938Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52\",\"namespace\":\"test-tcptop-2975123826752321008\",\"pod\":\"test-pod\",\"container\":\"test-pod\",\"type\":\"normal\",\"pid\":2473243,\"comm\":\"nc\",\"proto\":\"TCP\",\"addr\":\"::\",\"port\":9090,\"opts\":\".R...\",\"mountnsid\":4026533",
+        "2022-09-30T12:04:23.9871243Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52\",\"namespace\":\"test-tcptopxxx-2975123826752321008\",\"pod\":\"test-pod\",\"container\":\"test-pod\",\"type\":\"normal\",\"pid\":2473226,\"comm\":\"nc\",\"proto\":\"TCP\",\"addr\":\"::\",\"port\":9090,\"opts\":\".R...\",\"mountnsid\":4026533142}\n2022-09-30T12:04:23.9872938Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52\",\"namespace\":\"test-tcptopxxx-2975123826752321008\",\"pod\":\"test-pod\",\"container\":\"test-pod\",\"type\":\"normal\",\"pid\":2473243,\"comm\":\"nc\",\"proto\":\"TCP\",\"addr\":\"::\",\"port\":9090,\"opts\":\".R...\",\"mountnsid\":4026533142}\n2022-09-30T12:04:23.9874744Z         {\"node\":\"arotestingcluster-kmcjg-worker-eastus2-nnb52\",\"namespace\":\"test-tcptopxxx-2975123826752321008\",\"pod\":\"test-pod\",\"container\":\"test-pod\",\"type\":\"normal\",\"pi"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
